description_long: This object is a low-cut athletic shoe with a rounded toe and a slightly raised heel, designed for comfort and support during walking or running. The upper appears to be constructed from a flexible material, likely synthetic mesh or fabric, with subtle texturing visible along the sides. The sole is thick and rugged, suggesting good traction and shock absorption, and the overall silhouette is streamlined for urban or casual use. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the shoe features a standard lace-up closure system. The heel and toe are reinforced, providing additional durability and structure. The shoe is monochromatic, with a uniform dark color across all visible surfaces.
description: A low-cut, lace-up athletic shoe with a rugged sole and a streamlined, monochromatic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the rounded toe, lace area, and thick, textured sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe and the central lace area, with the sole's width visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the profile, showing the heel, arch, and sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel structure and the back of the sole.
